title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, restore defaults - it is returned to Bass
scenario: Verify that after selecting an EQ value, closing the EQ tab, and performing Restore Defaults, the EQ resets to the default Bass setting.
steps: 1. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
3. Navigate to Device Settings > Reset Device > Restore Defaults.
expected: The EQ value should be reset to Bass.
